scripts.start:backend: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ -f backend/backend/package.json ]; then cd backend/backend; elif [ -f backend/package.json ]; then cd backend; else cd .; fi; npm install --omit=dev; npm run deploy || true; npm start'
scripts.start:frontend: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ -f frontend/frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend/frontend; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend; else cd .; fi; npm install --omit=dev; if npm run | grep -q build:all; then npm run build:all; else npm run build; fi; npm start'
